name: Italian Celebration Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Frozen family-sized pound cake (16 oz), thawed
3 tablespoons Orange-flavored liqueur (can substitute orange juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Cocoa-Mocha Frosting (recipe follows).
2. Slice the top and end pieces off the pound cake to form a rectangle.
3. Slice crosswise to form three even layers.
4. Sprinkle the top of each layer with liqueur or juice.
5. Put a fine sieve over a medium bowl.
6. Using a rubber scraper, press ricotta through the sieve.
7. Fold in candied fruit and chocolate chips.
8. Place the bottom layer of cake on heavy-duty foil.
9. Spread evenly with half of the cheese mixture.
10. Top with the second layer of cake, then the remaining cheese.
11. Top with the third layer, wrap tightly with foil, and chill for two or three hours until well chilled.
12. Cover the top and sides with mocha frosting.
13. Cover and refrigerate.
Cocoa-Mocha Frosting:
1/2 cup butter, softened
3 tablespoons warm water
3 teaspoons powdered instant coffee
1/3 cup European-style cocoa
1 1/2 cups powdered sugar
1. In a small mixer bowl, beat the butter until creamy.
2. In a small cup, mix the coffee powder and warm water.
3. Mix cocoa and powdered sugar, then add alternately to the butter with the coffee mixture.
4. Beat until smooth and creamy.
5. Frost the top and sides of the cake. Makes about 2 cups frosting.
